name: The Clubhouse Hawaii
address: 820 W Hind Dr unit 102, Honolulu, HI 96821
about: The Clubhouse Hawaii is a comprehensive golf hub offering simulator play, club fitting, lessons, repairs, and retail sales. They utilize Trackman technology for their golf simulators, providing a premium experience for players looking to practice or play virtual golf. The venue also features club fitting services, putter fittings, golf lessons, and a build shop for repairs, making it a one-stop destination for golfers of all skill levels. Located in Honolulu, they operate daily with extended hours and offer additional amenities like darts and pinball for a social hangout experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Comprehensive services including fitting, lessons, and repairs in one location
Social atmosphere with additional amenities like darts and pinball
Flexible booking options for individuals, groups, and leagues

food_and_drink.notes: Available onsite with a full kitchen
Full bar service available on premises

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate simulation

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use equipment provided at the venue. They also offer club rentals and custom fitting services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drink may not be permitted. They offer food and beverages for purchase on site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes about 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Clubhouse Hawaii welcomes families and has activities suitable for kids including darts and pinball games.
